settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize your workspace, writing preferences, and AI behavior.
settings.search.noResults: No settings sections match your search.
settings.language.title: Language & Region
settings.language.description: Choose the display language for the user interface.
settings.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.appearance.presetHint: Accent and warmth presets stack with your dark/light theme.
settings.editor.title: Editor Preferences
settings.editor.previewText1: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed non risus. Suspendisse lectus tortor, dignissim sit amet, adipiscing nec, ultricies sed, dolor.
settings.editor.previewText2: Cras elementum ultrices diam. Maecenas ligula massa, varius a, semper congue, euismod non, mi. Proin porttitor, orci nec nonummy molestie, enim est eleifend mi, non fermentum diam nisl sit amet erat.
settings.ai.title: AI Configuration
settings.ai.creativityDescription: Higher values produce more unexpected results.
settings.apiKey.title: Gemini API Key
settings.apiKey.securityTip1: Your API key is encrypted and stored locally on your device only
settings.apiKey.securityTip2: Never share your API key with anyone
settings.apiKey.securityTip3: Restrict your key to *.github.io in Google AI Studio
settings.apiKey.saved: API key saved and encrypted successfully
settings.apiKey.errorInvalid: Invalid API key format. Key should start with 'AIza'
settings.apiKey.getKeyHint: Get your free API key from
settings.data.title: Project Data & Backups
settings.data.description: Manage your project data. Your project is saved automatically to this browser.
settings.data.snapshotsDescription: The app automatically creates backups. You can restore a previous version here.
settings.data.noSnapshots: No snapshots available yet. Snapshots will be created automatically as you work.
settings.data.settingsFile.title: Settings file
settings.data.settingsFile.description: Export or import application settings as JSON (appearance, editor, shortcuts). Does not include API keys.
settings.data.importError: Failed to import project. The file may be corrupt or in the wrong format.
settings.data.libraryExport.title: Encrypted library backup
settings.data.libraryExport.description: Download all projects, snapshots, codex, RAG vectors, and binder assets as one password-protected ZIP. API keys are never included.
settings.data.libraryExport.errorBody: Could not build the encrypted archive. Try again or export a single-project JSON.
settings.resetModal.title: Reset Project?
settings.resetModal.description: Are you sure you want to reset the project? All characters, worlds, and manuscript content will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModal.title: Restore Snapshot?
settings.restoreModal.description: Restoring this snapshot will overwrite your current project. All changes made since {{date}} will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
settings.restoreModal.wordCountInfo: This snapshot has {{snapshotWordCount}} words. Your current project has {{currentWordCount}} words.
settings.deleteModal.title: Delete Snapshot?
settings.deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this snapshot?
settings.about.title: About StoryCraft Studio
settings.about.description: Your AI-powered creative partner for writing.
settings.about.githubDescription: View source code, report issues, and contribute.
settings.health.title: App health snapshot
settings.health.description: Runtime diagnostics only — not a substitute for CI Lighthouse or bundle reports.
settings.health.buildNote: Enable “App health snapshot” under Experimental flags to see this panel.
settings.advancedEditor.title: Advanced Editor Features
settings.advancedAi.title: Advanced AI Settings
settings.advancedAi.localRagDescription: Builds a privacy-preserving vector index in your browser storage. Hybrid mode generates semantic embeddings via the local MiniLM model for richer AI context.
settings.advancedAi.ragModeHint: Hybrid mode blends keyword matching with semantic understanding — best for most stories. Rebuild the index after large edits.
settings.featureFlags.title: Early Access Features
settings.featureFlags.description: Try features we're still refining. Your feedback shapes what ships next.
settings.featureFlags.enableStoryBibleAd: Story Bible advanced (graph + hints in Codex)
settings.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
settings.shortcuts.description: Customize shortcuts for frequent actions. Conflicting chords are highlighted in amber.
settings.shortcuts.conflictWarning: These chord combinations are assigned more than once:
settings.accessibility.title: Accessibility Settings
settings.accessibility.hub.intro: Improve contrast, motion, focus, and screen reader cues. All choices stay on your device.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.motorH: Larger text, stronger focus rings, and comfortable tap targets.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.lowVis: High contrast, large text, and clear focus indicators.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.cognit: Less motion and fewer non-essential announcements.
settings.accessibility.hub.preset.screen: Screen reader mode on with detailed live region updates.
settings.accessibility.hub.helpHint: Shortcuts, command palette, and inclusive use.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy & Security
settings.privacy.encryptionSetup: Set a passphrase to encrypt all manuscripts, snapshots and settings stored on this device.
settings.privacy.encryptionWarning: If you forget your passphrase, your data cannot be recovered.
settings.privacy.encryptionTooShort: Passphrase must be at least 8 characters
settings.privacy.encryptionActiveStatus: Encryption active — data is protected for this session
settings.privacy.encryptionLockedStatus: Encryption enabled but locked — enter your passphrase to access data
settings.privacy.encryptionForgotPassphr: Disabling encryption will remove the passphrase gate. If any data was encrypted under your passphrase it will become unreadable — export a backup first if in doubt.
settings.performance.title: Performance Settings
settings.notifications.title: Notification Settings
settings.collaboration.title: Collaboration Settings
settings.collaboration.webrtcSignalingUr: One wss:// or ws:// URL per line. Used for Yjs collaboration discovery. Leave the defaults unless you self-host signaling. The site CSP allows secure WebSocket schemes (wss:/ws:).
settings.integrations.title: Third-Party Integrations
settings.integrations.languageToolPrivac: Send text only to the URL you configure. Remote servers stay blocked while “local-only privacy” is enabled unless you use localhost.
settings.backup.title: Backup & Sync Settings
settings.ai.anthropicHint: Anthropic requires a proxy server or the Tauri desktop app for API calls.
settings.ai.ollamaHint: Make sure ollama serve is running and CORS is enabled.
settings.ai.transformers.hint: Runs any Xenova-compatible HuggingFace model locally via WebAssembly or WebGPU.
settings.ai.transformers.wasmNote: Example: Xenova/distilgpt2 — model files download on first use.
settings.ai.webllmHint: Runs entirely in your browser via WebGPU (optional packages). Large model downloads on first use; use Ollama on desktop for heavier models.
settings.ai.ollamaTauriBypass: Desktop build: StoryCraft calls Ollama directly — no browser CORS barrier.
settings.ai.ollamaBrowserNote: Ollama is only available in the desktop app. The browser's Content Security Policy blocks direct connections to localhost.
settings.ai.geminiSelected: Google Gemini is selected. Configure the API key in the section
settings.ai.anthropicCorsNote: Anthropic Claude cannot be called directly from the browser. Set up a proxy server or use the Tauri desktop app for Anthropic calls.
settings.ai.providerDescription: Choose which AI provider StoryCraft Studio should use.
settings.ai.openAiCompatHint: Leave empty for official OpenAI. For OpenRouter use https://openrouter.ai/api — confirm models and pricing on the provider site (May 2026).
settings.ai.ollamaModelHint: Quick-select models reported by your server — tap to use.
settings.ai.hybridFallbackHint: If the primary provider fails, StoryCraft tries the listed fallbacks (scene generators, codex tools). Writer streaming uses your primary provider only.
settings.advancedAi.modelRecommendations: Popular local checkpoints (verify names in your runtime):
settings.ai.webllm.modelSelectAriaLabel: Select a WebLLM model for local inference
settings.ai.webllm.fallbackChain: Fallback chain: WebLLM → ONNX WASM → Transformers.js
settings.ai.webllm.tabLeaderNote: Only one browser tab runs local inference at a time.
settings.ai.onnx.wasmNote: ONNX Runtime Web runs models via WebAssembly — no GPU required.
settings.projectAi.title: Per-Project AI Settings
settings.projectAi.description: Override global AI settings for this project only. Useful when writing multiple works in different styles or genres.
settings.projectAi.enableToggleHint: When on, the settings below replace your global AI configuration for all AI actions in this project.
settings.projectAi.systemPromptHint: Injected before every AI prompt in this project. Leave empty to use the default.
settings.projectAi.loraModelPathHint: Path to a LoRA adapter compatible with the selected local model. Leave empty to disable.
settings.projectAi.loraScaleHint: Controls the influence of the LoRA adapter (0 = disabled, 1 = full, 2 = double).
settings.projectAi.presetActivatedDescri: Per-project AI overrides are now active for all AI actions.
settings.guide.title: Settings guide
settings.guide.intro: Overview of every settings category. Use search at the top of Settings to jump quickly.
settings.guide.general.title: General
settings.guide.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.guide.editor.title: Editor
settings.guide.advancedEditor.title: Advanced editor
settings.guide.ai.title: AI
settings.guide.advancedAi.title: Advanced AI
settings.guide.advancedAi.desc: Models, hybrid fallback, local RAG index, DuckDB analytics.
settings.guide.projectAi.title: Project AI presets
settings.guide.accessibility.title: Accessibility
settings.guide.privacy.title: Privacy
settings.guide.performance.title: Performance
settings.guide.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.guide.collaboration.title: Collaboration
settings.guide.integrations.title: Integrations
settings.guide.backup.title: Backup
settings.guide.data.title: Data
settings.guide.data.desc: Import/export JSON, library ZIP, reset, open data folder.
settings.guide.experimental.title: Early Access Features
settings.guide.experimental.desc: Experimental features you can try before they're fully released.
settings.guide.shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
settings.guide.about.title: About
settings.guide.about.desc: Version, credits, app health, desktop updater.
settings.overview.title: Quick links
settings.tauri.upToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.data.openDataFolderHint: Opens the app data directory in your file manager (desktop only).
dashboard.backup.title: Backup & restore
dashboard.backup.hint: Export your project, import a backup, or open full backup settings.
settings.featureFlags.enableIdbAtRestEnc: IDB at-rest encryption (AES-256-GCM) — enable via Settings › Privacy
settings.loraAdapters.title: LoRA Adapters
settings.loraAdapters.description: Load LoRA fine-tuning adapters for local WebLLM models. Adapters are stored in your browser and never sent to the cloud.
settings.loraAdapters.flagGate: Enable "LoRA adapter inference" in Experimental Flags to use this section.
settings.loraAdapters.emptyState: No adapters loaded. Upload a compatible .safetensors file.
settings.loraAdapters.uploadError: Failed to load adapter. The file may be invalid or too large.
settings.loraAdapters.notice: Browser-based LoRA inference requires WebLLM with a compatible base model. Training is not supported — load pre-trained adapters only.
settings.plugins.title: Plugins
settings.plugins.description: Manage StoryCraft Studio extension plugins. Plugins run in a sandboxed API layer and can only access the permissions they declare.
settings.plugins.flagGate: Enable "Plugin system" in Experimental Flags to use this section.
settings.plugins.sandboxNotice: All plugins run through a sandboxed capability API. No plugin has direct access to the Redux store, network, or file system beyond declared permissions.
settings.plugins.emptyState: No plugins registered. Install a plugin by calling pluginRegistry.register() from the browser console or a future plugin loader.
settings.community.title: Community
settings.community.description: Connect with other StoryCraft Studio users, share story templates, and browse the curated local AI model list.
settings.community.discussionsHint: Share templates, ask questions, show your work.
settings.community.issuesHint: Bug reports and feature requests welcome.
settings.community.modelListDescription: Recommended models for offline writing. Enable a local AI provider in AI Configuration to use them.
settings.community.onnxModels: ONNX Runtime — works in all browsers
settings.community.useCase.eco: Fastest, lowest memory — good for quick suggestions
settings.community.useCase.reasoning: Strong reasoning — good for plot analysis
settings.community.useCase.wasm: No GPU required — works in any browser
settings.voice.title: Voice Full Support
settings.voice.intro: Control StoryCraft Studio with your voice. All voice processing runs locally for maximum privacy.
settings.voice.enableHint: Activate voice commands, dictation, and audio feedback.
settings.voice.privacyNotice: Voice data is processed locally on your device. No audio is sent to the cloud unless you explicitly enable cloud fallback below.
settings.voice.ttsMutedHint: Disable text-to-speech while keeping visual indicators.
settings.voice.autoPunctuationHint: Automatically add periods and commas while dictating.
settings.voice.cloudFallbackHint: When local speech recognition is unavailable, send audio to cloud providers. Requires internet.
settings.voice.privacy.consentBody: The Web Speech API sends your audio to Google or Microsoft servers for transcription. By clicking Acknowledge, you consent to this data transfer under GDPR Art. 13.
